cross_thesis_names.story: T&D transformer = triple-convergence bottleneck (renewables / DC / rail)

Cables (T&D + DC) — #1 wire & cable, scale leader
Cables (T&D + DC) — EHV-grade growth, secondary to POLYCAB

streams.title: DEEP-RESEARCH MINI-PROJECT — Warsh Paradox + US Curve Steepener: India-Market Implications
streams.thesis: If Kevin Warsh is confirmed as Fed Chair on May 15, his stated views imply a US yield-curve steepener — dovish on the Fed Funds short-end (he sees AI as structurally deflationary), but anti-QE / pro-smaller-balance-sheet on the…

streams.title: TANLA vs GENESYS — Cross-Comparison
streams.thesis: India VIX 19.71 (above 18 watch threshold), Brent crude $99, USDINR ₹94, Nifty intraday -1%

streams.title: DEEP_RESEARCH — MAPMYINDIA: Governance gate + GIS×AI thesis
streams.thesis: MAPMYINDIA is a 30+ year old Indian map-and-IoT company run by the Verma family. The books look clean at the top — family owns half, no pledging, no SEBI action, long track record.…

streams.title: 5-LAYER CAKE — India Edition — v1
streams.thesis: Layer 1 Energy — India's power-transition is active (PLI solar, grid buildout, nuclear at the edges). Multiple listed plays

streams.title: India Stack / DPI Sub-Layer
streams.thesis: India's Digital Public Infrastructure (UPI + Aadhaar + DigiLocker + ONDC + Account Aggregator) is a public data layer with no US equivalent.…

P1.description: Blank-slate rules rebuild from all system-trade data. Analysis layer made regime- + horizon-aware (non-destructive); Conviction Book (long-term thesis book) stood up; non-destructive go-live eligibility gate added. Dashboard render lenses = remaining.

P2.description: Four connected finance/research plugins (bigdata.com, Daloopa, LSEG, design) are used in ZERO places in the vault — largest under-used Claude capability.

template.source: DR corpus (defence-railways brief); HBL IR / concall guidance
template.notes: TEMPLATE (exited). The canonical 'orders won != orders executed': fat order book + Kavach guidance, but actual ~1,452 cum route-km vs a 5,000-5,500 km/yr pace required -> execution running ~27% of the guidance-implied pace; must 3-4x. execution_pace_ratio = 1452 / 5500. Book-to-bill would look great; execution rate exposes the cliff.

fib_confluences.method: fib-box confluence = box edges from TWO+ different ladders within ~1.5% of each other
fib_confluences.note: Engine-detected cross-ladder fib-box confluences from verified banks (box_engine.py). Surfaced for operator validation over time — observations, not calls. Every px = a banked ladder's box edge; distance is vs the live price. AT = within ~2% of the confluence.
